task_completion.description: Create standard flowchart symbols in LibreOffice Writer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 6 shapes drawn in the LibreOffice Writer document, specifically including ovals (for start/end), rectangles (for process steps), and a diamond (for the decision).

task_completion.description: Add the required text labels to the shapes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specific text labels inside the shapes: 'Need Identified', 'Create Requisition', 'Cost > $500?', 'Auto-Approve', 'Manager Review', and 'Issue PO'.

task_completion.description: Connect the shapes using dynamic connectors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 5 connector lines or arrows linking the shapes together in a logical flow.

task_completion.description: Label the decision branches with 'Yes' and 'No'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Yes' and 'No' placed next to the connector lines exiting the diamond (decision) shape.

task_completion.description: Group all shapes and connectors into a single object
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent selecting all shapes and connectors and using the 'Group' function (e.g., via right-click context menu or Format menu), or a single large bounding box with sizing handles encompassing the entire flowchart.
Look for a save dialog saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/procurement_flow.odt', or the title bar of LibreOffice Writer displaying 'procurement_flow.odt'.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to create the flowchart
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent actively clicking on drawing tools, shapes, and menus within the LibreOffice Writer interface.

integrity.description: Agent created actual drawing objects rather than pasting an image
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for individual shape selection handles, connector anchor points, or text editing cursors inside the shapes, proving it is not a single pasted static image.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a terminal script to bypass GUI creation
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the terminal is not used to run a python script or other command-line tool that automatically generates the .odt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/procurement_flow.odt. The flowchart must contain a minimum of 6 shapes and 5 connectors. The required text labels inside the shapes are exactly: 'Need Identified', 'Create Requisition', 'Cost > $500?' (note the question mark), 'Auto-Approve', 'Manager Review', and 'Issue PO'. Decision branches must be labeled 'Yes' and 'No'.
